analysis.executive_summary: Audit crawled 3,566 pages from 3 documentation sites for a single product. Critical infrastructure issues identified: 17,110 broken internal links creating severe navigation failures. SEO and geo-targeting problems affect 16.63% of pages. Zero API reference pages detected in sample, indicating missing or inaccessible technical documentation. Only 5.08% of pages display freshness metadata, obscuring content currency for users.
strengths: Large documentation corpus with 3,566 pages crawled indicates substantial content investment
Multi-site presence suggests community and official documentation efforts
Topology identified as single-product focus enables coherent user journey design
risks: 17,110 broken internal links represent catastrophic navigation failure and user abandonment risk
No API reference pages found threatens developer adoption and integration success
16.63% SEO/geo issue rate damages discoverability and organic search performance
5.08% freshness coverage prevents users from assessing content reliability and currency
0.0% example reliability estimate indicates code samples may be untested or non-functional
Multi-site documentation architecture for single product creates fragmentation and version confusion
Crawl reached only 3,566 of 30,964 requested pages, suggesting deep structural or performance issues

prioritized_actions.action: Execute broken link remediation campaign: audit all 17,110 broken links, fix or redirect top 500 by traffic impact within 30 days
Locate or create API reference documentation; if exists, fix discoverability and crawlability; if missing, prioritize creation
Consolidate multi-site documentation into single authoritative domain with clear versioning and redirect strategy
Implement automated last-updated timestamps on all pages and establish content review SLA
Resolve SEO/geo issues on affected 16.63% of pages: audit meta tags, hreflang, and indexing directives

limitations: External crawl cannot verify accuracy of technical content, code functionality, or instructional correctness
Authentication-gated or dynamically rendered content may be underrepresented in crawl results
User behavior, satisfaction, and task completion rates require separate analytics and user research
Competitive positioning and feature parity assessment not included in technical documentation audit
Crawl limited to 4,500 max pages may not represent full documentation estate or deep hierarchy
